days.text: Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 2 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Light winds, becoming force 2 to 3 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 2 to 3 south to southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 southerly winds.
Mainly cloudy. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
